title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 305.295 - Establishment of an airport authority by an eligible entity, jurisdiction
text:
305.295.  Establishment of an airport authority by an eligible entity, jurisdiction. — Whenever the fiscal body of one or more eligible entities, acting individually or jointly, adopts an ordinance or a resolution in favor of the establishment of an airport authority under this chapter*, there is established an airport authority.  The authority has jurisdiction over a district with boundaries conterminous with the jurisdictional boundaries of the entity or entities adopting the ordinance or resolution.  The authority must have a name including the words "airport authority".
(L. 2012 S.B. 628 § 1) 
*Original rolls of SB 628 numbered this section as "Section 1".  This section was assigned to Chapter 305 by the Revisor under section 3.060.
